Localization.Description: A user deleted an object in Zabbix. This could be an attacker's attempt to disguise malicious activity, tools, or malware in the system or to disrupt the functionality of the system.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} deleted application configuration "{object.name}" in Zabbix on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted application "{object.name}" in Zabbix on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted detection rule "{object.name}" in Zabbix on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted service "{object.name}" in Zabbix on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted host "{object.name}" in Zabbix on host {event_src.host}
